content:
自開服以來，我們透過同人徵集活動收穫了諸多精美作品，感謝大家精彩絕倫的創作，更感謝大家對《忘卻前夜》的支持與喜愛！

未來我們將定期分享所徵集到的優秀二創與攻略作品，期待各位的參與！

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Since the launch, we have collected many exquisite works through fan art submission events. Thank you for your incredible creations and your unwavering support and love for 《Morimens》!

In the future, we will regularly share outstanding fan creations and strategy guides from these submissions. Stay tuned and join us!
thread_title: 🎊彌薩格藝術展：精彩同人作品分享┊Mythag Art Exhibition: Amazing Fan Art Showcase

content:
<:slick:1356053160531198064> 萊克轉盤呼呼轉動，這次指針指向──校園舞會群舞時間！
必得召喚活動“未被忘卻的”，5連抽必得《忘卻篇》所選界域的隨機SSR限定喚醒體×2、限定命輪×3。

萊克的轉盤還能轉出什麼呢？後續將為大家陸續揭曉！
——————————————
<:slick:1356053160531198064> Ryker's turntable is spinning, and this time the pointer points to the time for the school dance group dance!
The summoning event "Not Forgotten" is guaranteed. If you draw 5 times in a row, you will definitely get 2 random SSR limited SSR Awakener and 3 Limited SSR Wheel of Destiny from the selected realm of "Faded Legacy".

What else can Ryker's turntable bring out? We will reveal it to you later!
